fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a unique code for the bin type.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the bin type.

fields.name: Receive
fields.tooltip: Specifies to use the bin for items that have just arrived at the warehouse.

fields.name: Ship
fields.tooltip: Specifies to use the bin for items that are about to be shipped out of the warehouse.

fields.name: Put Away
fields.tooltip: Specifies to use the bin for items that are being put away, such as receipts and internal put-always.

fields.name: Pick
fields.tooltip: Specifies to use the bin for items that can be picked for shipment, internal picks, and production.
